title: involucrella lithophila
intro: Involucrella lithophila is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the 'Lithophila plant'. It is a rare, epiphytic plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Involucrella lithophila can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
